title: goupia glabra
intro: Goupia glabra, also known as Black Pear Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gouiaceae, native to tropical Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Goupia glabra has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving cardiovascular health. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and herbal preparations often include the leaves, bark, or seeds, which can be used to treat various ailments.
